name: IdsEdwEntyLicDExtr

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A12_TMP_IdsEdwEntyLicDExtr; WITH cte_0 AS (SELECT ENTY.ENTY_LIC_SK, COALESCE(cd.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, ENTY.ENTY_ID, ENTY.LIC_SEQ_NO, ENTY.CMN_PRCT_SK, ENTY.PROV_SK, ENTY.ENTY_LIC_ST_CD_SK, ENTY.CMN_PRCT_IN, ENTY.EFF_DT_SK, ENTY.TERM_DT_SK, ENTY.LIC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.ENTY_LIC ENTY LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cd ON ENTY.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = cd.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_1 AS (SELECT CD_MPPNG_SK, COALESCE(TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD, COALESCE(TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS TRGT_CD_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG), cte_2 AS (SELECT cte_0.ENTY_LIC_SK, cte_0.SRC_SYS_CD, cte_0.ENTY_ID, cte_0.LIC_SEQ_NO, cte_0.CMN_PRCT_SK, cte_0.PROV_SK, cte_0.ENTY_LIC_ST_CD_SK, cte_0.CMN_PRCT_IN, cte_0.EFF_DT_SK, cte_0.TERM_DT_SK, cte_0.LIC_NO, cte_1.TRGT_CD AS ENTY_LIC_ST_CD, cte_1.TRGT_CD_NM AS ENTY_LIC_ST_NM FROM cte_0 LEFT JOIN cte_1 ON cte_0.ENTY_LIC_ST_CD_SK = cte_1.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_3 AS (SELECT cte_2.ENTY_LIC_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_2.SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_2.SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte_2.ENTY_ID, cte_2.LIC_SEQ_NO AS ENTY_LIC_SEQ_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_2.CMN_PRCT_SK, cte_2.PROV_SK, cte_2.CMN_PRCT_IN, cte_2.EFF_DT_SK AS ENTY_LIC_EFF_DT_SK, cte_2.LIC_NO AS ENTY_LIC_NO, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_2.ENTY_LIC_ST_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_2.ENTY_LIC_ST_CD END AS ENTY_LIC_ST_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_2.ENTY_LIC_ST_NM) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte_2.ENTY_LIC_ST_NM END AS ENTY_LIC_ST_NM, cte_2.TERM_DT_SK AS ENTY_LIC_TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte_2.ENTY_LIC_ST_CD_SK FROM cte_2) SELECT ENTY_LIC_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, ENTY_ID, ENTY_LIC_SEQ_NO, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CMN_PRCT_SK, PROV_SK, CMN_PRCT_IN, ENTY_LIC_EFF_DT_SK, ENTY_LIC_NO, ENTY_LIC_ST_CD, ENTY_LIC_ST_NM, ENTY_LIC_TERM_DT_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, ENTY_LIC_ST_CD_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A12_TMP_IdsEdwEntyLicDExtr FROM cte_3

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2005 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     EdwProvEntyLicExtr

DESCRIPTION:  
                       Pulls data from ids
      

INPUTS:
	IDS - ENTY_LIC
  
HASH FILES:
                hf_cdma_codes         - CDMA code table - resolve code lookups
               

TRANSFORMS:  
                  TRIM all the fields that are extracted or used in lookups
                           
PROCESSING:
                  IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes
                
  

OUTPUTS: 
                    ENTY_LIC_D.dat

MODIFICATIONS:
              Oliver Nielsen  09/13/2005    Originally Programmed

===============================================


MODIFICATIONS:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
DEVELOPER                         DATE                 PROJECT                                                  DESCRIPTION                                        DATASTAGE   ENVIRONMENT                     CODE  REVIEW            REVIEW DATE                    
-----------------------------                 ----------------------      ------------------------------                                  -----------------------------------                               ------------------------------                                          ------------------------------      --------------------
Nagesh Bandi                         06/28/2013        5114-Enterprise Efficiencies                 Move ids to edw for ENTY_LIC_D                EnterpriseWrhseDevl                                     Bhoomi Dasari               9/3/2013

Annotations:
This is Source extract data from an IDS table and apply Code denormalization, create a load ready file.

Job Name:
IdsEdwEntyLicDExtr

Table:
ENTY_LIC_D
Read from source table ENTY_LIC from IDS.
This is a load ready file conforms to the target table structure.

Write ENTY_LIC_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Job.
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys: 
CD_MPPNG_SK
Add Defaults and Null Handling
